title: satureja marifolia
intro: Satureja marifolia, also known as Iranian savory, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Iran. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Satureja marifolia include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
